case_title: MICHAEL H HUMMER VS. SAN FRANCISCO LEGAL SUPPORT, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMMER, MICHAEL H AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO LEGAL SUPPORT, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA FIRST LEGAL SUPPORT SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMMER, MICHAEL H RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO LEGAL SUPPORT, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA FIRST LEGAL SUPPORT SERVICES $4,627.98 PRINCIPAL, $14.77 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,822.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMMER, MICHAEL H AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO LEGAL SUPPORT, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA FIRST LEGAL SUPPORT SERVICES
